title: Occupational Health and Safety Program Educational Objectives
content:
Occupational Health and Safety Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To train “occupational health and safety technicians” with the knowledge, skills and abilities to undertake the entire occupational safety responsibility of a business.

2. To train individuals who follow, interpret and act in accordance with professional ethical rules regarding occupational health and safety, take all necessary precautions to ensure occupational safety in a business, can conduct risk analysis of the institution they work for and take necessary precautions to prevent risks, are sensitive to current events regarding occupational health and safety and follow developments.
